title: Mama opens door — her surprised face (solo)
prompt: Medium shot in cozy anniversary living room with twinkling fairy lights and heart-shaped balloons. Front door slowly OPENS. @Mama steps in framed in the doorway, gym leggings + workout top + gym bag over shoulder. Head TURNS to the room, eyes WIDEN huge in surprise, hand COVERS mouth in shock-joy gasp. Off-camera family voices joyful: "SURPRISE! HAPPY ANNIVERSARY!"
